summary: Iteration 515: Layer 2 Regression Suite Part 1 - ALL 34 TESTS PASSED. Backend API tests (20/20 passed) covering Auth deep tests, Draft persistence, Dashboard APIs. Frontend UI tests (14/14 passed) covering CTA routing, Studio fresh session, and protected route handling.

issues: Upsell modal ('You're on fire!') appears on studio page - intentional gamification as noted in iteration 514
Same upsell modal appears - consistent behavior

seed_data_creation: Created test registration user with unique email for AUTH-REG-1 test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Layer 2 Regression Part 1 complete. All auth, draft, dashboard, CTA routing, and studio tests passed. The landing page CTAs have been redesigned - 'Create Your First Video' navigates to /experience, while 'Write Your Own Story' and 'Beat the Leader' CTAs are on the authenticated dashboard. Studio page is accessible at /app/story-video-studio with all expected fields (title, story text, animation style, target age, narrator voice). Draft persistence API works correctly with save/discard/status transitions. Dashboard init returns all expected fields with 20s TTL caching.

AUTH-REG-1.details: Signup with valid email/password - account created, token returned

AUTH-REG-2.details: Duplicate email registration - correctly rejected with 400

AUTH-REG-3.details: Wrong password login - generic error message, no info leak

AUTH-REG-4.details: Non-existent email login - generic failure message

AUTH-REG-7.details: Admin route protection - standard user blocked from admin endpoints

CTA-REG-1.details: 'Create Your First Video' CTA navigates to /experience

CTA-REG-2.details: 'Write Your Own Story' and 'Beat the Leader' are distinct CTAs on dashboard

CTA-REG-3.details: Protected routes redirect to login when unauthenticated

STUDIO-REG-1.details: Fresh studio has empty title input field

STUDIO-REG-2.details: Fresh studio has empty story text area

STUDIO-REG-3.details: Style selector visible (2D Cartoon, Anime, 3D Animation, etc.)

STUDIO-REG-4.details: Voice/age selectors visible (Target Age, Narrator Voice)

STUDIO-REG-5.details: Recent drafts panel - 'RECENT VIDEOS' panel visible on right side

DRAFT-REG-1.details: Save draft with title only - success

DRAFT-REG-2.details: Save draft with story text only - success

DRAFT-REG-3.details: Save draft with metadata (animation_style, voice_preset) - success

DRAFT-REG-5.details: DELETE /api/drafts/discard clears draft, GET returns null

DRAFT-REG-7.details: Draft failure recovery - revert processing to draft - success

DRAFT-REG-8.details: GET /api/drafts/recent returns max 3 items with correct structure

DRAFT-REG-9.details: Idea generation for all vibes (kids, drama, thriller, viral, empty) - valid responses

DASH-REG-1.details: Dashboard init returns all expected fields (feed, top_stories, viral_status, viral_leaderboard)

DASH-REG-2.details: Dashboard caching works - two rapid calls return consistent data

DASH-REG-3.details: Admin dashboard init returns same structure

DASH-REG-4.details: Test user gets numeric credits, Admin gets unlimited (999999)

notes: Landing page CTAs have been redesigned - main CTA is now 'Create Your First Video — Free' which goes to /experience
'Write Your Own Story' and 'Beat the Leader' CTAs are on the authenticated dashboard under 'Choose Your Path' section
Studio page accessible at /app/story-video-studio even without auth (shows 401 errors for API calls but page loads)
WebSocket connection warning for progress tracking - non-blocking
CSP warning for Cloudflare beacon script - non-blocking
